name: phosphorite
description: Complete rewrite of Phosphorite with proper architecture

scripts.install-all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../gm-client && npm install && cd ../player-client && npm install
scripts.postinstall: npm run install-all || echo "postinstall: subproject install failed; you can run 'npm run install-all' manually"
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run gm-client" "npm run player-client"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../gm-client && npm run build && cd ../player-client && npm run build
scripts.start: npx concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:gm" "npm run start:player"
